response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist software engineer with 20 years of experience across a wide range of platforms and languages, but he does not meet the core requirements of this Staff GenAI role. The position demands 8+ years of production AI solution delivery; the resume shows only approximately one year of AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq, starting April 2025). Python — the primary language for AI/ML engineering — is absent from his skills list entirely. There is no mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI, all of which are central to the role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise with production-scale delivery across multiple companies
Direct hands-on experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq, which is directly relevant to the key technologies listed
Long track record of technical leadership, mentoring, workshop facilitation, and staff-level ownership across diverse engineering environments
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume skills and project history — a critical gap for any Staff GenAI engineering role
No evidence of vector database usage, RAG architecture design, or LLM evaluation/observability work anywhere in the resume
AI and GenAI experience is limited to roughly one year in the current role; the required 8+ years of production AI solution delivery is not demonstrated

key_factors.factor: MCP server and agentic workflow work
